book_summary: Revelation 1-22 has full chapter coverage with source-audited-draft restored translation and mystical companion layers. The book is handled as symbolic/apocalyptic resistance literature centered on the Lamb: unveiling, seven assemblies, throne worship, Lamb power-reversal, seals, trumpets, witnesses, woman/dragon, beasts, Babylon, bowls, Lamb wedding, final judgment, New Jerusalem, river/tree of life, healing of nations, and final invitation.
translation_notes: Apokalypsis means unveiling; Revelation is symbolic apocalypse/prophecy/letter, not a modern disaster-codebook.
The Lamb is the interpretive center. Lion power is revealed as slain-standing Lamb witness.
Beast, Babylon, mark, trumpets, bowls, and battle imagery must not be mapped onto modern individuals, ethnic groups, technologies, vaccines, or political enemies.
Babylon is empire/economic exploitation imagery, especially luxury built on bodies and human souls/lives.
Swords from the mouth are word/judgment imagery; do not literalize into violence.
Judean/Jewish conflict lines in assembly letters must not become anti-Jewish theology.
Woman/prostitute imagery must not be used misogynistically or against sex workers; symbols critique exploitative systems.
144,000 and great multitude preserve Israel and nations together without erasure.
Final restoration is creation-positive: new heaven/new earth, New Jerusalem descending, nations healed, tree of life, no curse, no more death.
Mystical companion layer remains interpretive and does not replace source-audited restored text.
source_witness_audit_flags: Revelation requires apocalyptic genre metadata and anti-fearmongering safeguards in second pass.
Revelation 13:18 number 666 requires gematria/imperial context audit.
Revelation 2-3 local assembly conflict rhetoric requires anti-Jewish and anti-targeting review.
Revelation 17-18 Babylon/Rome/economic cargo list requires empire-history audit.
Revelation 20 millennium/Gog-Magog requires non-sensational reception-history audit.
Revelation 21-22 Eden/New Jerusalem imagery requires creation-restoration thematic crosslinks.
next_actions: New Testament complete. Next recommended phase: create metadata/new-testament-progress.json summarizing all 27 NT books complete, then begin Old Testament/common scaffold continuation or begin source-witness second-pass audit metadata.
